title: Chilubi District Council (Seal) Order, 1984

sections.title: AB from the commencement of this Order, the common Common
sections.body:
seal of the Chilubi District Council shall be the device in the seal
form set out in the Schedule hereto.
N. MUNDIA,
LUSAKA Prime Minister
5th April, 1984
